channel.title: ziangsfoodworkshop TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from ziangsfoodworkshop

item.title: Cannot believe our debut cookbook has made it to the coming soon banner for Waterstones which is huge, not even close to publishing yet which again is massive! Thank you for support, you've been amazing, keep this up and we could be on the Telivised Visua
item.description: Cannot believe our debut cookbook has made it to the coming soon banner for Waterstones which is huge, not even close to publishing yet which again is massive! Thank you for support, you've been amazing, keep this up and we could be on the Telivised Visua

item.title: If you like egg rolls then you have to try this recipe, we don’t really get egg rolls in UK Chinese takeaways, but there well worth a try, these are very similar to our string rolls, in fact they’re pretty much the same, but hand made instead of using bou
item.description: If you like egg rolls then you have to try this recipe, we don’t really get egg rolls in UK Chinese takeaways, but there well worth a try, these are very similar to our string rolls, in fact they’re pretty much the same, but hand made instead of using bou

item.title: Paid promotion: If you like your chicken chow mein with the thinner noodles, then I got you covered with this Chinese takeaway chicken chow mein recipes 🥢🍜🍗, that I have infact used in takeouts before, so it’s legit 😊 and thank you @LuckyBoatNoodles for w
item.description: Paid promotion: If you like your chicken chow mein with the thinner noodles, then I got you covered with this Chinese takeaway chicken chow mein recipes 🥢🍜🍗, that I have infact used in takeouts before, so it’s legit 😊 and thank you @LuckyBoatNoodles for w

item.title: If you like crispy chicken then you have to try this crispy smoked chilli chicken recipe 🍗🔥 #foodtok #easyrecipe #homecooking #chickenrecipe #smokedchicken
item.description: If you like crispy chicken then you have to try this crispy smoked chilli chicken recipe 🍗🔥 #foodtok #easyrecipe #homecooking #chickenrecipe #smokedchicken

item.title: Back teaching Chinese takeaway cookery @School of Wok this July! Book fast as they sold out in 24hours of going on sell last time 😊 #foodtok #cookery #chinesetakeaway #homecooking #easyrecipes
item.description: Back teaching Chinese takeaway cookery @School of Wok this July! Book fast as they sold out in 24hours of going on sell last time 😊 #foodtok #cookery #chinesetakeaway #homecooking #easyrecipes

item.title: Here is a easy Char Sui pork belly recipe. One that is used in a few Chinese takeaways, it’s easy to make and store for later use! Remember if you can and have the means, to support your local takeaways and takeouts, helping small local businesses stay af
item.description: Here is a easy Char Sui pork belly recipe. One that is used in a few Chinese takeaways, it’s easy to make and store for later use! Remember if you can and have the means, to support your local takeaways and takeouts, helping small local businesses stay af

item.title: Paid Promotion: Here is a recipe for Chinese takeaway special fried rice, also known as yung, young and yum chow fried rice, how ever you say it, it’s all the same 😊🥢🥡🍚 remember to support your local takeaway if you can, supporting a small Local business
item.description: Paid Promotion: Here is a recipe for Chinese takeaway special fried rice, also known as yung, young and yum chow fried rice, how ever you say it, it’s all the same 😊🥢🥡🍚 remember to support your local takeaway if you can, supporting a small Local business

item.title: We have a whole new loads of products on our website, if you like the free content make sure to check it out and it’s free shipping on all orders over £45! Www.ziangs.com or click link in bio link tree. Also if you’d like videos on how to use the products
item.description: We have a whole new loads of products on our website, if you like the free content make sure to check it out and it’s free shipping on all orders over £45! Www.ziangs.com or click link in bio link tree. Also if you’d like videos on how to use the products

item.title: Here is how to use the kind of paste Thai takeouts and Chinese takeaways will use, it’s a super easy and tasty recipe for a chicken Thai green curry 🍗🌶️🔥, this is my own version, not may takeaways will make it like this, but you can make this as simple or
item.description: Here is how to use the kind of paste Thai takeouts and Chinese takeaways will use, it’s a super easy and tasty recipe for a chicken Thai green curry 🍗🌶️🔥, this is my own version, not may takeaways will make it like this, but you can make this as simple or

item.title: Paid Promotion: Here is an easy Kari (curry) Laksa recipe. This is a recipe I’ve been making since I was in my teens, especially at uni as it was cheap, so well over 2 decades ago now, but I’d also miss out the sea woodlice. It’s super easy, no need to wo
item.description: Paid Promotion: Here is an easy Kari (curry) Laksa recipe. This is a recipe I’ve been making since I was in my teens, especially at uni as it was cheap, so well over 2 decades ago now, but I’d also miss out the sea woodlice. It’s super easy, no need to wo

item.title: Here is a recipe for Chinese takeout style tender beef, in this video I show you how to velvet beef like a takeaway would and how many modern takeouts are cooking the beef off now. In all my videos I fry it off the old school way, but wanted to show you t
item.description: Here is a recipe for Chinese takeout style tender beef, in this video I show you how to velvet beef like a takeaway would and how many modern takeouts are cooking the beef off now. In all my videos I fry it off the old school way, but wanted to show you t

item.title: We traveled from Somerset to Edinburgh to help raise money for the China Star restaurant, made viral by @🍓LISA🍓 wanting to save her mums restaurant. This as all makes possible and sponsored by @LuckyBoatNoodles meaning that all money taken that night went
item.description: We traveled from Somerset to Edinburgh to help raise money for the China Star restaurant, made viral by @🍓LISA🍓 wanting to save her mums restaurant. This as all makes possible and sponsored by @LuckyBoatNoodles meaning that all money taken that night went

item.title: Here is a recipe for the dry crispy batter that chicken takeaways use for dishes like sweet and sour chicken Hong Kong style, salt and pepper chicken and much more! There are a few was to make this, but this is my favourite. 🥢🍗🥡 #chinesefood #crispychicke
item.description: Here is a recipe for the dry crispy batter that chicken takeaways use for dishes like sweet and sour chicken Hong Kong style, salt and pepper chicken and much more! There are a few was to make this, but this is my favourite. 🥢🍗🥡 #chinesefood #crispychicke

item.title: Still some place left @School of Wok on the 11th July! It’s always a great time when I’m there! Hopefully see some of you soon 😊😊 #chinesetakeaway #ziangs #comfortfood #chef #homecooking
item.description: Still some place left @School of Wok on the 11th July! It’s always a great time when I’m there! Hopefully see some of you soon 😊😊 #chinesetakeaway #ziangs #comfortfood #chef #homecooking

item.title: Here is the exact recipe we used for our chow mein dish at the China Star in Edingbrugh when we took over the kitchen there. Really try this out as it’s so much better than the standard recipes we’ve done in the past. Thank you @LuckyBoatNoodles for worki
item.description: Here is the exact recipe we used for our chow mein dish at the China Star in Edingbrugh when we took over the kitchen there. Really try this out as it’s so much better than the standard recipes we’ve done in the past. Thank you @LuckyBoatNoodles for worki

item.title: Here is a recipe for sweet and sour king prawn balls, a Chinese takeaway classic, it’s super easy and this version is the way Mum likes to make them! #sweetandsour #seafood #chinesetakeaway #comfortfood #homecooking
item.description: Here is a recipe for sweet and sour king prawn balls, a Chinese takeaway classic, it’s super easy and this version is the way Mum likes to make them! #sweetandsour #seafood #chinesetakeaway #comfortfood #homecooking

item.title: We’re heading to the BBC Good Food Show at the NEC in Birmingham this Sunday as ambassadors for @Jimmy's Sate stall. We’ll be live-streaming an exclusive Singapore chow mein recipe that hasn’t appeared in any of our cookbooks or previous videos. The live
item.description: We’re heading to the BBC Good Food Show at the NEC in Birmingham this Sunday as ambassadors for @Jimmy's Sate stall. We’ll be live-streaming an exclusive Singapore chow mein recipe that hasn’t appeared in any of our cookbooks or previous videos. The live

item.title: Here’s just a quick vlog of our time @Good Food Shows at the Birmingham NEC, where we were ambassadors for @Jimmy's Sate We didn’t have the ingredients to do our own demo but we have decided to film it and it will be and live tomorrow for you to watch! Re
item.description: Here’s just a quick vlog of our time @Good Food Shows at the Birmingham NEC, where we were ambassadors for @Jimmy's Sate We didn’t have the ingredients to do our own demo but we have decided to film it and it will be and live tomorrow for you to watch! Re

item.title: This recipe for Singapore chow mein won’t be used in many Chinese takeaways or restaurants at all, but it’s mine and Mums go to version to cook at home, made with the legendary @Jimmy's Sate using @LuckyBoatNoodles thin ramen noodles both pair so well tog
item.description: This recipe for Singapore chow mein won’t be used in many Chinese takeaways or restaurants at all, but it’s mine and Mums go to version to cook at home, made with the legendary @Jimmy's Sate using @LuckyBoatNoodles thin ramen noodles both pair so well tog

item.title: Here is the reveal of our Chinese takeaway cookbook with 70 of the best recipes from the first 2 Chinese takeaway cookbooks and 50 brand new ones never seen before! It’s Pre Order right now and we have been known to sell out in pre orders so pre ordering
item.description: Here is the reveal of our Chinese takeaway cookbook with 70 of the best recipes from the first 2 Chinese takeaway cookbooks and 50 brand new ones never seen before! It’s Pre Order right now and we have been known to sell out in pre orders so pre ordering

item.title: Yesterday we did the cover reveal for the new cookbook, and lots of you pre ordered, so thank you for that support! I made this video to explain that if you want a chance to enter the up coming competition (details to be confirmed) you need to of pre orde
item.description: Yesterday we did the cover reveal for the new cookbook, and lots of you pre ordered, so thank you for that support! I made this video to explain that if you want a chance to enter the up coming competition (details to be confirmed) you need to of pre orde

item.title: Thank you all for getting our new cookbook “the Ultimate Chinese Takeaway Bible” to the top 100 of books sold on Amazon today! It’s just for today and most likely drop off by tonight but thank you to all that have pre ordered, means absolutely nothing in
item.description: Thank you all for getting our new cookbook “the Ultimate Chinese Takeaway Bible” to the top 100 of books sold on Amazon today! It’s just for today and most likely drop off by tonight but thank you to all that have pre ordered, means absolutely nothing in

item.title: If you like sweet and sour sauce, you have to try this recipe for it, this is one of the ways they made it back in the day, obviously Chinese takeaways and takeouts would of had there own version, this is just the one I grew up making. Remember if you can
item.description: If you like sweet and sour sauce, you have to try this recipe for it, this is one of the ways they made it back in the day, obviously Chinese takeaways and takeouts would of had there own version, this is just the one I grew up making. Remember if you can

item.title: Thank you @Lisa He for sending us the apron, was an amazing night at @chinastar mum was said that she didn’t get an apron to remember it by so I gave the one you sent me to her to open and have 😊 @LuckyBoatNoodles and @popcornpr did an amazing job on thes
item.description: Thank you @Lisa He for sending us the apron, was an amazing night at @chinastar mum was said that she didn’t get an apron to remember it by so I gave the one you sent me to her to open and have 😊 @LuckyBoatNoodles and @popcornpr did an amazing job on thes

item.title: Our ingredients and snacks mystery box will be available very soon, it’s a trial to see if they’re worth doing so are limited, for where to get information on these, just ask in the comments section 😊 #ziangs #cooking #foodtok #recipes #mysteryboxes
item.description: Our ingredients and snacks mystery box will be available very soon, it’s a trial to see if they’re worth doing so are limited, for where to get information on these, just ask in the comments section 😊 #ziangs #cooking #foodtok #recipes #mysteryboxes

item.title: Here is a Chinese takeaway style recipe for chicken and sweetcorn with steamed Thai fragrant rice, but healthier than traditional Chinese takeout! 🥡 ingredients below! Thank you Green Dragon for working with us on this video. Ingredients 1 cup Green Drago
item.description: Here is a Chinese takeaway style recipe for chicken and sweetcorn with steamed Thai fragrant rice, but healthier than traditional Chinese takeout! 🥡 ingredients below! Thank you Green Dragon for working with us on this video. Ingredients 1 cup Green Drago

item.title: If you like beef, ginger and spring onion then this Chinese takeaway recipe is a must try for you! It’s found in our new cookbook too! 🥩🥢 #cooking #recipes #chef #chinesetakeaway #beefrecipe
item.description: If you like beef, ginger and spring onion then this Chinese takeaway recipe is a must try for you! It’s found in our new cookbook too! 🥩🥢 #cooking #recipes #chef #chinesetakeaway #beefrecipe

item.title: Replying to @mark what is MSG is a question I get asked a lot, I’ve made this video a few times, but thought I make it again as there are so many more people following now. Please take my humor as tongue in cheek, because if you don’t know it’s not bad fo
item.description: Replying to @mark what is MSG is a question I get asked a lot, I’ve made this video a few times, but thought I make it again as there are so many more people following now. Please take my humor as tongue in cheek, because if you don’t know it’s not bad fo
